title: Experian Health - AI-Powered Revenue Cycle Management
problem: Healthcare providers lose revenue to claim denials, inaccurate patient information, and inefficient eligibility verification. Manual processes are slow and error-prone.
solution: Patient Access Curator uses AI/ML to verify and correct eligibility, COB primacy, demographics, MBI, and insurance discovery in seconds. Integrated revenue cycle automation across the entire claims lifecycle.
technology: Machine learning, AI agents, X12 270/271, real-time eligibility APIs
ai_type: ML for eligibility verification, AI for denial prevention
regulatory_notes: HIPAA compliant, integrated with major EHR systems
varden_fit: HIGH — Proves AI can automate eligibility verification. Model for EU replication with insurance discovery and COB verification for multi-payer European systems.
notes: CONTRARIAN: Insurance discovery and eligibility verification are unsexy but critical. European insurers have no equivalent AI-powered verification tools.
